FSD)"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"txt"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"src/
  app/                      # только роутинг, layout, page, route handlers
    (public)/
      page.tsx
    (auth)/

    tasks/
      [id]/
        page.tsx
        layout.tsx
  pages/                    # (опционально) если используешь Pages Router
  shared/
    ui/
    lib/
    config/
    api/
  entities/
    task/
      model/
      ui/
      api/
  features/
    solve-task/
      ui/
      model/
      lib/
  widgets/
    task-workspace/
      ui/
  # слой pages в FSD часто НЕ нужен в Next, потому что "pages" = app routes
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Как “склеивать” FSD и Next-роуты"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"В "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"app/.../page.tsx"},{"type":"text","text":" ты обычно:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"берёшь данные (server actions / fetch / ORM)"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"подключаешь "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"widgets/features/entities"},{"type":"text","text":" и собираешь страницу"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Пример:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"tsx"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"// src/app/tasks/[id]/page.tsx

}

"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Она:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"❌ "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"не добавляет сегмент в URL"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✅ помогает "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"структурировать проект"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✅ позволяет иметь "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"разные layout’ы для разных зон"}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"📁 Базовый пример"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"txt"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"app/
